basic_details.job_title: ISRO SDSC SHAR Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Satish Dhawan Space Centre, Sriharikota (ISRO SDSC SHAR)
basic_details.short_information: DON'T MISSRRB 6565 Technician Online Form 2026 (Short Notice)6,565 Posts • Technician • RRB29 Jul 20266,565 postsOSSSC 5989 Nursing Officer Online Form 20265,989 Vacancies • Nursing Officer13 Jul 20265,989 postsGSRTC 4599 Driver Online Form 20264,599 Openings • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,599 postsGSRTC 4318 Conductor Online Form 20264,318 Posts • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,318 postsKSP Civil Police Constable Online Form 20263,991 Vacancies • Civil Police Constable • KSP03 Jul 20263,991 postsMPSC 2619 Group C Online Form 20262,619 Openings • Group C17 Jul 20262,619 posts

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 35 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST: 5 years OBC(NCL): 3 years PWBD: As per Govt. of India orders Ex-Servicemen: As per Govt. of India orders

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. in Meteorology/Atmospheric Sciences/Oceanography/Physics/Applied Physics with Meteorology or equivalent subjects as the main subject. ME/M.Tech in Atmospheric Science/Ocean sciences with at least 3 years of research experience with at least one research paper in Science Citation Index (SCI) journal related to Atmospheric/ Oceanic/ Climate Sciences.
qualification.details: Research Associate-I (RA-I): Ph.D. in Meteorology /Atmospheric Sciences/ Oceanography/Physics/ Applied Physics With Meteorology or equivalent subjects as the main subject. OR ME/M.Tech in Atmospheric Science/Ocean sciences with at least 3 years of research experience with at least one research paper in Science Citation Index (SCI) journal related to Atmospheric/ Oceanic/ Climate Sciences.

salary_details.details: Consolidated payment of Rs. 58,000/- per month House Rent Allowance as applicable (if hostel accommodation is not provided)

selection_process: Initial screening based on academic performance and other parameters Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the ISRO SDSC SHAR Research Associate-I Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 17-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of ISRO SDSC SHAR to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download ISRO SDSC SHAR Research Associate-I Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ISRO SDSC SHAR Research Associate-I recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for online registration and application submission is 17th July 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well in advance to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Associate-I post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Ph.D. in relevant fields like Meteorology or Atmospheric Sciences, or an ME/M.Tech with at least 3 years of research experience and a SCI journal publication.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The age limit for candidates applying for the Research Associate-I position is between 18 and 35 years. Age relaxations are applicable for reserved categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. How much is the application fee for ISRO SDSC SHAR recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 250/- for all candidates except those who are exempted. Women, SC, ST, Ex-Servicemen, and PwBD candidates are exempted from paying the fee.

faq.question: Q5. Is this a permanent or temporary job?
faq.answer: The Research Associate-I position is a temporary job. This offers a great opportunity for individuals looking for short-term research roles in a prestigious organization.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Research Associate-I position?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a consolidated payment of Rs. 58,000/- per month. House Rent Allowance may also be provided if hostel accommodation is not offered.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves an initial screening based on academic performance and other relevant parameters, followed by an interview for shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article. It contains all the detailed information regarding the recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are invited in ONLINE mode only. Candidates need to register and submit their applications through the official ISRO SDSC SHAR website.

faq.question: Q10. What is the location of the job?
faq.answer: The job is located at Satish Dhawan Space Centre, Sriharikota, Andhra Pradesh, with the pincode 524124.
